title: Why adopting an adult cat might be a better fit for you than a kitten
description: LIFESTYLE NEWS - Kittens may steal the...
bodyText:
LIFESTYLE NEWS - Kittens may steal the spotlight with their cuteness, but adopting an adult cat comes with plenty of perks. Let’s take a look:


> A responsible and rewarding choice


Adopting an adult cat gives a loving home to a pet that might otherwise be overlooked, and the bond you form can be deeply fulfilling.


> Wide variety to choose from


Adult cats come in all shapes, sizes, ages, and personalities, making it easier to find one that fits your lifestyle.


> Expert guidance


Shelter staff know each cat well and can help match you with a pet whose temperament and needs suit your home.


> Trained and independent


Most adult cats are already litter-trained and have established routines, which can make the transition smoother.


> Calmer companions


Fully grown cats are often quieter and more predictable than energetic kittens, making them ideal for a relaxed household.


> Health checks completed


Shelter cats are usually treated for parasites, examined by a vet, and often sterilised and vaccinated before adoption.

Remember to give your new feline friend time to adjust to your home and family – be kind and patient, and you will soon be rewarded.

For more information, visit Royal Canin.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
